com.mimecast.robin.storage

Packages that use com.mimecast.robin.storage
Package
Description
com.mimecast.robin.main
The entry point and core components of the Robin application.
com.mimecast.robin.storage
Manages the storage of incoming emails for the server.

    Description
    LmtpConnectionPool
    Connection pool for LMTP deliveries with actual connection reuse.
    StorageClient
    Server file storage interface.
    StorageProcessor

    Description
